exercises.prompt: Si tuviera más tiempo, leería más libros.
exercises.answer: If I had more time, I would read more books.

exercises.prompt: Nos gustaría viajar más si fuera posible.
exercises.answer: We would like to travel more if it were possible.

exercises.prompt: Él compraría la casa si tuviera suficiente dinero.
exercises.answer: He would buy the house if he had enough money.
